name: mysmb-marketplace
description: Curated agent plugins for SMB-focused business integrations - Xero, QuickBooks, Stripe, HubSpot, and more.

plugins.name: deskcrm
plugins.description: Lightweight SMB CRM backed by an Excel workbook. Stores contacts and accounts in Contacts and Accounts sheets and exposes CRUD operations over a stdio MCP server. Primarily used for testing the marketplace and plugin lifecycle.

plugins.name: microsoft-365
plugins.description: Access Microsoft 365 emails, calendar, files, Teams, and people via Microsoft Graph. Five MCP servers with independent OAuth scopes.

plugins.name: xero-accounting
plugins.description: Full Xero Accounting API coverage via the myHub-hosted OAuth MCP gateway. 95 tools covering sales, purchases, banking, and all 8 financial reports. Browser OAuth, no API keys.
